commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5ee56a3bfc38f513c34d53a7a88856923618bdff)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Matrix reply delivery to pass explicit reasoning replies to `sendMessageMatrix` as `m.notice`, adds a `msgtype` option for text sends, and adds focused Matrix helper tests.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +80. Total +89 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main's dispatch path suppresses `isReasoning` before Matrix dispatcher delivery, and the PR leaves that upstream filter in place. I did not run a live Matrix client in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs author or maintainer repair on the dispatch path plus real Matrix proof; automation should not claim the external setup proof for the contributor.

target.title: fix(matrix): deliver reasoning notices
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #81892.

- deliver Matrix reasoning replies instead of suppressing all `isReasoning` payloads
- send reasoning replies as Matrix `m.notice` events so they remain low-noise
- keep the existing suppression for reasoning-looking text when `isReasoning` is not set
- add focused Matrix reply tests and cover the Matrix send msgtype override path

## Real Behavior Proof

### Behavior

Before this change, `deliverMatrixReplies` skipped every reply with `isReasoning === true`, so Matrix users with `/reasoning on` never received the reasoning block. After this change, reasoning payloads are passed to `sendMessageMatrix` with `msgtype: "m.notice"`, while normal answer text still uses the default text message behavior.

### Environment

- Repository: `openclaw/openclaw`
- Branch: `fastino-81892-matrix-reasoning`
- Platform tested: macOS arm64 local checkout
- Node runtime from local repo tooling: Node.js v26.0.0

### Steps

```sh
pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/replies.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/replies.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send/types.ts
pnpm exec oxlint extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/replies.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/replies.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send/types.ts --report-unused-disable-directives-severity error
pnpm test extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/replies.test.ts
pnpm test extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.test.ts
```

### Evidence

```text
Checking formatting...

All matched files use the correct format.
Finished in 280ms on 4 files using 18 threads.
```

```text
pnpm exec oxlint extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/replies.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/replies.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send/types.ts --report-unused-disable-directives-severity error

exit code 0
```

```text
$ node scripts/test-projects.mjs extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/replies.test.ts
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts

 RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/allahyar/Documents/fastino-tasks/openclaw-tui-81892

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  10 passed (10)
   Start at  06:47:54
   Duration  632ms (transform 408ms, setup 399ms, import 35ms, tests 47ms, environment 0ms)

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 14.89s
```

```text
$ node scripts/test-projects.mjs extensions/matrix/src/matrix/send.test.ts
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts

 RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/allahyar/Documents/fastino-tasks/openclaw-tui-81892

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  39 passed (39)
   Start at  06:47:44
   Duration  4.30s (transform 2.07s, setup 798ms, import 3.13s, tests 189ms, environment 0ms)

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 8.94s
```

### Observed Result

- A reasoning reply with `isReasoning: true` is delivered to Matrix as `msgtype: "m.notice"`.
- A following visible answer is still delivered without a msgtype override.
- Reasoning-looking text without `isReasoning` is still suppressed as before.
- Matrix send tests still pass with the new optional msgtype override.

### Scope

The regression proof exercises the Matrix reply delivery path and Matrix send option construction in the repository test harness. The changed behavior is the `deliverMatrixReplies` decision to send `isReasoning` payloads and the `sendMessageMatrix` text event content construction that preserves `m.notice`.
target.author: sahibzada-allahyar
